zh.lifeSummary: 當Ada Botetourt於大約1295年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾聖 布利亞維爾斯時，她的父親John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt30歲，母親Maud fitz Thomas27歲。她於1345年之前與Sir Richard Fitz Simon結婚。她去世於大約1350年在英國波克夏享年57歲。

nameMeanings.name: Ada
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin; it was not in general use before the late 18th century. It may be a Latinate variant of the biblical name Adah . However, it has also been explained as a pet form of Adele and Adelaide , Germanic female names of which the first element is adal ‘noble’. It was borne by a 7th-century abbess of Saint-Julien-des-Prés at Le Mans.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Ada Botetourt was born about 1295, in St Briavels, Gloucestershire, England, her father, John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt, was 30 and her mother, Maud fitz Thomas, was 27. She married Sir Richard Fitz Simon before 1345. She died about 1350, in Berkshire, England, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ada Botetourt est née environ 1295, à St Briavels, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Maud fitz Thomas, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Fitz Simon avant 1345. Elle est décédée environ 1350, à Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ada Botetourt um 1295 in St Briavels, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt 30 und ihre Mutter Maud fitz Thomas 27. Sie hat vor 1345 Sir Richard Fitz Simon geheiratet. Sie starb um 1350 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Berkshire, England.

Lei sposato Sir Richard Fitz Simon prima del 1345. Morì circa 1350, nel Berkshire, England, all'età di 57 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Ada Botetourt(이)가 대략 1295년 영국 그루스스터실르 스트 브리아벨스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud fitz Thomas(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1345년 이전 Sir Richard Fitz Simon(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 대략 1350년 영국 버크실르에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ada Botetourt родилась около 1295 г. в местности ст брявелс, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud fitz Thomas, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Fitz Simon перед 1345 г. Она умерла около 1350 г. в местности биркшир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет.
